assessment.note: He sees a clear leverage-targeting gap in his current work while still sounding invested in shipping; also named 'highest-leverage work' as a concrete thread.

new_queue.label: Highest-leverage work
new_queue.name: When you say 'highest-leverage work,' what work do you think that is here?
new_queue.description: Drills into his own definition of higher-leverage Principal work before moving on.

new_queue.label: Principal scope today
new_queue.name: What does Principal scope mean on this team to you right now?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether Tom is operating from current expectations or old assumptions.

new_queue.label: Visible leverage
new_queue.name: Where do you think your leverage is most visible in the work today?
new_queue.description: Looks for concrete examples of impact beyond steady delivery.

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?
new_queue.description: Tests whether they can name their own gaps before the manager does.

new_queue.label: Questioning cadence
new_queue.name: What tends to stop you from asking a question early?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the pattern behind low early alignment and whether it is habit, context, or caution.

new_queue.label: Next signal
new_queue.name: What would you want me to see differently by our next check-in?
new_queue.description: Closes on a specific behavioural change or visible signal without opening new topics.
